ops.text:
Plan approved (plan file: acct-12/plans/why-do-we-have-pure-mochi.md; codex spec: ~/.cache/codex-ask/runs/codex-ask.rl1non89/codex-r-euu_tgrl). Executing the 4-phase migration: (1) captain-hook major rewrite to two providers (builtin_packs in wheel + fixed plugin path capt-hook/{pack.toml,hooks/}), (2) move 7 plugin packs across 6 repos, (3) delete all fleet consumer config, (4) e2e + releases.

Baseline established:
- captain-hook main = b28312b5 (CI fully green; 7620ddb6 with [tools] registry is an ancestor). Rewrite runs in worktree .claude/worktrees/pack-redesign, branch pack-redesign. Root checkout is detached+dirty (concurrent session) — untouched.
- cc-context working copy cleaned: the stale [tools]/0.9.0 hunks were duplicates of remotely-landed work (pack 0.10.0 via plugin 0.28.3/0.28.4, origin/main b37cf076); rebased @ onto b37cf076 and restored the 3 files — @ now empty. Shared-working-copy hazard dissolved.
- Fleet roster (deterministic script): 42 repos with .claude/capt-hook.toml, 38 fragment layouts (4 PACKBLOCK repos hand-maintained: cc-context/cc-guides/cc-notes/cc-present). Every ccx (5), cc-notes (33), cc-guides (1) pin is backed by an enabled plugin. cc-present pins (authkit, cc-pane, cc-sudo, daemonkit, experiment-at-home + self) have NO cc-present@cc-present enabled — Phase 3 must add it.
- Full activation delta matrix (44 dispatch-surface repos): +performance ×7 (authkit, cc-context, cc-guides, cc-notes, cc-present, crm, daily); spawnllm +go (go/go.mod); yclaw +go (pkgs/hermes-docker-proxy/go.mod); getaway +python (cli/pyproject.toml); ego −python (TS-only); write-like-me (+builtins,python) and yasyf.com (+builtins,go) are plugin-dispatch-only repos with no config today. All deltas consistent with the approved design; none require drift fixes.

In flight: ch-rewrite (opus, Phase 1 rewrite), getaway-audit (codex, pack fate), guides-retire-recon (codex, artifact-retirement procedure).
